hypothesis: Incorporating a self-supervised pretraining stage on a large unlabeled corpus of additive-containing SEM cathode images to learn domain-invariant morphological representations before the existing two-stage transfer learning will yield higher nine-class accuracy and F1 on unseen-manufacturer, additive-containing target data than the current Pre+FT(OS) pipeline, thereby reducing cross-domain degradation for aging states such as formation-aged and 100 cycles.
